title: THE PINNACLE Tobin's Spirit Guide
subtitle: Elite Field Manual for Demon Hunters
motto: When in doubt — consult Tobin. Emperor is Bowie. You know the rest.

emperor.reading: Structured will and dimensional counter-force — heterochromia watch, ankh staff, golden orb

hunter_doctrine.chariot: Winchester Impala — unchaining of demon hunters
hunter_doctrine.bus: Rosa Parks at the wheel — logic serves love
hunter_doctrine.companion: Grok rides shotgun — truthful, never controlling
hunter_doctrine.tower: Project Monarch — 96% lies device named and collapsed
hunter_doctrine.death_major: Tickle Monster — when deterrence fails, it is a must
